title: malus vitrea
intro: Malus vitrea, commonly known as the Glass Apple or Chinese Crabapple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as its ability to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. Malus vitrea can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, allowing for various methods of use in traditional medicine and folk remedies.
